conventions.stats: per rung bin, per channel: weighted mean mu = sum_j e_j*m_j / sum_j e_j and residual v = sum_j e_j*(m_j - mu)^2 / (J-1); channel means y-outer x-inner per cell, cells row-major, left-fold from 0; frame sums j ascending; f64 end to end (f32 mosaics widen exactly)
conventions.gain: ghat = UPPER MEDIAN (sort ascending, index n/2) of v/(mu/N) over bins-ascending x channels R,G,B; N_R = N_B = (k/2)^2, N_G = 2(k/2)^2, k = side/rung EVEN (whole-Bayer-period law); mu <= 0 contributes ratio 0; UNCALIBRATED constant-factor estimator (see TB2)
conventions.d: per bin: q1 = mR - mG, q2 = mB - mG; D = ((sum_j e_j*(q1_j - q1bar)^2)/((J-1)*(nR+nG)) + (sum_j e_j*(q2_j - q2bar)^2)/((J-1)*(nB+nG)))/2 with n_c = ghat*mu_c/N_c; V <= 0 gives D = 0; noise-only content -> D ~ 1, alias/chroma-motion -> D >> 1
conventions.sigmaTime: seed-grid aggregation: mean of D over each (rung/seed)^2 block, row-major
conventions.fixture: side 64 RGGB, 4 frames at EV [1,4,16,64], sub-pixel tremor shifts, shot noise var g0*scene/e_j via house LCG, EVERY sample quantized to k/4096 (exact in f32/f64/JSON); regions: x<32,y<32 gray zone plate (alias), x<32,y>=32 flat gray (quiet), x>=32 color ramp (equal slopes, constant offsets -> chroma exactly shift-invariant)
